mapper.select: SELECT CHECKLIST_NO AS no , TRAVEL_PLAN_NO AS planNo , CONTENT AS content , IS_CHECKED AS isChecked , TO_CHAR(CREATE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS createDt FROM PLAN_CHECKLIST WHERE TRAVEL_PLAN_NO = #{planNo} ORDER BY CREATE_DT ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT PLAN_CHECKLIST_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO PLAN_CHECKLIST (CHECKLIST_NO, TRAVEL_PLAN_NO, CONTENT) VALUES (#{no}, #{planNo}, #{content})
